song.title: What a Happy Day
song.lyrics: [V1] . CM7 What a happy day . Am7 When I no more could turn away, . Dm7 When Jesus took my heart .Gsus G From the black of night, . Em When Jesus took my heart . Bb A From the black of night . Dm7 G CM7 Into the kingdom of His light. [V2] Now my life’s begun, The “really life” that’s in the Son. No more am I enthralled By earth’s empty dreams. No more am I enthralled By earth’s empty dreams, Deep in me flows a living stream. [V3] As I turn to Him He fills me with His life within. His life becomes My life in reality; His life becomes My life in reality; Oh, Hallelujah, He’s in me! [V4] I just love you Lord, With other loves, You break the cord. You’ll be my life For all eternity; You’ll be my life For all eternity; You are the only one for me.
